summary: Verified Question Rules grouped view in Repairs Module. All features working correctly: rules grouped by Category then Question, answer values match Q&A exactly (1-2, 3-4, 4+, etc.), search works for category/part/question/condition value, expand/collapse works, Edit/Delete buttons functional, auto-repair detection in LiveProgressModal shows 40 items.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Search filter for condition_value was not working because it looked for rule.condition_value instead of rule.conditions[0].condition.value
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/RepairsModulePage.jsx - Fixed filteredRules search to include condition values from conditions array
seed_data_creation: None - used existing inspection Hiba. Mol (HR29AH5542)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Question Rules grouped view verified. GroupedRulesView component correctly groups rules by Category → Question → Individual Rules. Answer values like '1-2', '3-4', '4+' display correctly. Search now works for condition values after fix. Auto-repair detection in LiveProgressModal shows 40 items with correct pricing.

verified_features: Question Rules grouped by Category (e.g., Exterior Inspection, Brake System Inspection, AC & Cooling Inspection)
Within each category, rules grouped by Question (e.g., 'Please take Front Bumper Photo of the Vehicle')
Answer values match Q&A exactly: '1-2', '3-4', '4+' for Exterior Inspection questions
Answer values match Q&A exactly: 'Reduced cooling', 'Not cooling at all' for AC questions
Answer values match Q&A exactly: 'Low', 'immediate replacement' for Brake questions
Expand/collapse works for categories and questions
Edit button opens Edit Repair Rule modal with pre-populated data
Auto-repair detection in LiveProgressModal shows 40 items
Pricing breakdown shows Part cost and Labor cost correctly
